governance.description: Repo governance rules for OpenSIN-Code — the autonomous OpenSIN CLI

inboundRules.description: Rules for accepting external work into this repo

rules.rule: No raw external payloads inside repos
rules.enforcement: All external payloads MUST be normalized to work_item schema before storage

rules.rule: No accepted inbound work without GitHub issue creation/update
rules.enforcement: Every work_item MUST create or update a GitHub issue before any branch/PR work begins

rules.rule: No PR-based repo without watcher config + runnable watcher entrypoint
rules.enforcement: PR watcher MUST be configured and executable before accepting PRs

rules.rule: No platform activation without registry entry, signature/cursor verification, dedupe, and issue mapping
rules.enforcement: Platforms MUST pass all verification gates before activation
